seo.title: Building Data Extraction with AG2 + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build data extraction with AG2 + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building data extraction pipelines with AG2 enables multi-agent collaboration to parse unstructured documents into structured JSON schemas, leveraging group chat dynamics for robust extraction. Guardrails are essential to prevent conversation drift, factual inaccuracies, and schema violations that could corrupt downstream data pipelines. Vex integration ensures reliable outputs through automated verification of schema compliance and field accuracy.

architectureOverview.heading: Data Extraction Architecture with AG2
architectureOverview.description:
The typical AG2 data extraction architecture involves a Manager agent that orchestrates a group chat with specialized Extractor agents (e.g., Document Analyzer, Schema Validator, Field Extractor). Unstructured documents are fed into the group chat, where agents debate and refine extractions against a predefined JSON schema. The Manager enforces turn-taking and consensus before finalizing structured output.

AG2's enhanced group chat capabilities shine here, with speaker selection algorithms ensuring balanced participation. Agents reference the original document context to minimize hallucination risks. Final output passes through a termination condition verifying schema completeness.

Vex integrates as a message hook, validating intermediate agent messages against extraction criteria before they influence group consensus.
architectureOverview.diagram:
┌─────────────────┐    ┌──────────────────┐
│ Unstructured    │───▶│ AG2 Group Chat   │
│ Documents       │    │ - Manager Agent  │
└─────────────────┘    │ - Extractor Agts │
                      │ - Schema Validator│
                      │ [Vex Message Hook]│───▶┌─────────────────┐
                      └──────────────────┘    │ Structured JSON │
                                              │   Output         │
                                              └─────────────────┘

risks.name: Schema Drift
risks.description: Agents generate fields outside the defined JSON schema or omit required properties
risks.mitigation: Vex schema compliance checks on every agent message

risks.name: Conversation Drift
risks.description: Group chat spirals into unrelated topics, losing focus on document extraction
risks.mitigation: Vex topicality scoring tied to document content and schema

risks.name: Field Hallucination
risks.description: Agents invent data not present in source documents
risks.mitigation: Vex evidence traceability linking extractions to document spans

risks.name: Consensus on Errors
risks.description: Group chat reaches incorrect consensus due to speaker selection bias
risks.mitigation: Vex accuracy validation against ground truth patterns

implementation.title: Define Extraction Schema
implementation.description: Create Pydantic model defining expected structured output

implementation.title: Setup AG2 Group Chat
implementation.description: Configure Manager and Extractor agents with schema context
implementation.code:
from ag2 import GroupChat, GroupChatManager
from ag2.agent import AssistantAgent

manager = GroupChatManager([
    "extraction_schema",
    "document_context",
    "validation_rules"
])

extractor = AssistantAgent(
    name="Extractor",
    system_message="Extract data following the schema exactly. Quote document evidence."
)
validator = AssistantAgent(
    name="Validator",
    system_message="Verify completeness and accuracy against schema."
)

groupchat = GroupChat(agents=[extractor, validator], messages=[], max_round=10)

implementation.title: Initiate Document Extraction
implementation.description: Start group chat with document and schema instructions
implementation.code:
document = "Invoice #INV-1234 dated 2024-03-15 from Acme Corp total $2,450.00..."
schema_prompt = "Extract to this schema: " + InvoiceData.model_json_schema()

manager.initiate_chat(
    groupchat,
    message=f"""Extract from this document:\n{document}\n\n{schema_prompt}"""
)

implementation.title: Parse Structured Output
implementation.description: Validate and parse final group chat extraction

vexIntegration.title: Install and Initialize Vex
vexIntegration.description: Setup Vex SDK with AG2 message hook registration
vexIntegration.code:
pip install ag2 vex-sdk

from vex import Vex
from ag2.hooks import register_message_hook

vex = Vex(api_key="your-vex-api-key")

@register_message_hook
async def vex_guardrail(message: dict) -> bool:
    verdict = await vex.verify(
        message["content"],
        checks=[
            "pydantic:InvoiceData",
            "factual_consistency:document",
            "json_schema_compliance"
        ]
    )
    return verdict.passed

vexIntegration.title: Register Schema Compliance Check
vexIntegration.description: Configure Vex to validate Pydantic schema adherence in real-time
vexIntegration.code:
import vex

schema_check = {
    "name": "invoice_extraction",
    "pydantic_model": "InvoiceData",
    "required_fields": ["invoice_number", "date", "total_amount"],
    "type_constraints": {
        "total_amount": "numeric > 0",
        "date": "date-format:YYYY-MM-DD"
    }
}

# Register with Vex
client = vex.Client()
client.register_schema("invoice-extraction", schema_check)

# In AG2 hook:
result = client.validate_extraction(
    agent_message,
    schema_name="invoice-extraction",
    context=document
)

vexIntegration.title: Enable Group Chat Guardrails
vexIntegration.description: Comprehensive Vex monitoring for AG2 group conversations
vexIntegration.code:
from vex.checks import AG2GroupChatChecks

guardrails = AG2GroupChatChecks(
    schema_compliance=True,
    field_accuracy=0.95,
    completeness_threshold=1.0,
    topical_drift_max=0.1,
    evidence_required=True
)

# Auto-applied to all group chat messages
manager = GroupChatManager(
    agents=[extractor, validator],
    vex_checks=guardrails,
    fail_action="retry"
)

# Messages blocked if:
# ❌ Missing required fields
# ❌ Wrong data types
# ❌ No document evidence
# ❌ Off-topic discussion
